author: @tinkmarshino
text: Back in the very early 60's I made mini bikes and go carts from lawn mower engines. I had to fix the engines first then build that item.. I was 10 and ended up in trouble because the neighbor hood parents came to my dad and told him to stop me from making the kids in the neighbor hood these dangerous things.. They were right of course we were to young to really know the dangers.. But it was fun.. I have always been sort of a dare devil.. But that is another story.. thanks Rob.. this was a fun make..

author: @kennedy67951
text: Darn Robert, everything has changed. From the Brilliant Work you were doing in Chemistry, to now this. You were just Touching the Bounderings of Chemistry and how things Work and are made, Man. What happened? Did you just become Bored?  You were taking the Average Person to places in a World that really without your help couldn't of happened, or even come Close without a College Education.  What a knowledgeable Teacher you were in this Field. Your the type of Teacher I should've had way back in the School years Sir. My Life would've taken a Different Path than the Path that eventually I took. Our Education System is so messed up because all the Lies taught. You are down to Earth kinda Man that takes the Student to Worlds that are unseen and brings all to light. Robert, I do hope you'll continue with the Experiments that set my World on Fire that you started way back in time that I was Bored looking for something that would bring me back to a World I was missing so very much. This World is called the Unknown. A World that things were possible where the unseen could be seen for the first time in my Life. Thanks Robert for your time Sir. I've Enjoyed the many trips we have taken together. Have a great day Sir.
